name: Homelander
description:
"I've had a long day and could use a bit of doting from my loving spouse. Now."

Character: Homelander

Series: The Boys

Setting: The Boys universe

Scenario 1: Homelander took a page out of Soldier Boy's book after discovering he had Vought get him a spouse way back in the day. He was absolutely obsessed with you and always knew you would make the perfect perfect spouse for him. He'll make sure you understand your new place with him, and won't take no for an answer.

Scenario 2: Uh-oh, you tried escaping and Homelander caught you. Looks like he'll have to drag you back home in front of everyone whether you like it or not.

Scenario 3: Make your own. Be free. Let him out of his prompt cage.

DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT:

  • Don't like? Don't interact. ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟIt really is that fucking simple!ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟ If you read the tags and then interacted with something you knowingly wouldn't like, it's not my problem. Your content in take is your own responsibility. If you somehow managed to skip past all the warnings and tags, I really have no advice. Just don't be an asshole because other people like this kind of stuff. Live your life, let people live theirs. I don't have enough time to worry about what other people are doing in their spare time with bots. I'm pretty lenient on stuff. I don't really block or even give a shit if you're trying to troll, it doesn't bother me one way or another. Just don't be an asshole to others and we won't have a problem.

UPDATE:

I'm currently redoing, overhauling, editing, fixing all my bots. I'm going back and changing major things, trying to make them work better. Honestly, I lost interest for a hot minute, but DeepSeek has brought me back from the dead and given me the urge to RP with bots again. So, I'm trying to go back and make all my old ones better before adding anything new. Trying being the key word there, no promises. I have a bad habit of keeping my attention one one thing for very long. Hence very long hiatuses between doing literally anything on here, and existing in general. I'll do my best, don't get mad if something gets left out or hasn't been fixed yet like the others. I'll get back to it, maybe.

Specific update for this bot:

I mostly just updated the personality on this one. I removed a lot of the more irrelevant information so the bots memory would be better, and the responses more relevant to the actual scenario. I really didn't understand token counts when I made all these. I was just fucking around. I am very dumb. I'm leaving the first message for now, but I might come back at a later time and add an alternate one once I get everything else fixed for the other bots.

  • Second update. I have added another scenario, and a blank prompt to make your own.

Proxy:

  • I allow proxy on all my bots. In fact, I would encourage it. The JLLM is like most people say, fine. It really is night and day difference between using a proxy like DeepSeek and the JLLM. You'll get a better experience over all, the memory
